dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 7010 IH: To amend the Agriculture, Rural Development, Food and Drug Administration, and Related Agency Appropriations Act, 2026, to delay the implementation of amendments made by such Act to the hemp production provisions of the Agricultural Marketing Act of 1946.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Baird (for himself, Mr. Comer, Mr. Evans of Colorado, Mr. Moore of North Carolina, and Ms. Craig) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Agriculture

form.official-title: To amend the Agriculture, Rural Development, Food and Drug Administration, and Related Agency Appropriations Act, 2026, to delay the implementation of amendments made by such Act to the hemp production provisions of the Agricultural Marketing Act of 1946.

section.header: Delayed implementation of amendments to hemp production provisions
section.text: Section 781 of the Agriculture, Rural Development, Food and Drug Administration, and Related Agency Appropriations Act, 2026 (Public Law 119–37; 139 Stat. 558) is amended, in the matter preceding paragraph (1), by striking 365 days and inserting 3 years.
